ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Quality of the video (e.g., HD 720p, HD 1080p) */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language in which the video is provided */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the video was added to the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video content */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the video (e.g., action, comedy, drama) */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the video director */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "language_preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language preferred by the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's current subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_language_preference_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_preference_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watch_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watch history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video that was watched */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was watched */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video watched in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watch_history_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video for which analytics are recorded */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the video */,
  "average_watch_time" REAL /* Average watch time per user for the video */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate as a percentage */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total likes for the video */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Total dislikes for the video */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Total shares for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Subscription start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Subscription end date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "renewal_status" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription is set to renew automatically */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., English, Spanish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement_levels" (
  "engagement_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement level entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "engagement_level" TEXT /* Engagement level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_levels_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
